commonProblems.h2: Honda Clarity Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Honda Clarity PHEV generally demonstrates strong baseline reliability, but its complex 1.5L LEB3, LEB31, and LEB3A Atkinson-cycle hybrid powertrains face predictable wear points under prolonged UK grey-import usage. High-voltage interface stress, thermal cycling in charging modules, and e-CVT alignment fatigue dominate replacement enquiries. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty. Use the cost breakdowns below to decide whether a targeted repair or full replacement delivers the best value for your specific Clarity.

problems.group: Honda Clarity HV-Mode High Revs & Power Loss
problems.h4: Honda Clarity HV-Mode High Revs & Power Loss - Why LEB3 Hybrid Engines Fail Prematurely
problems.affectedModels: Honda Clarity Plug-in Hybrid Base & Touring (2017-2021, LEB3, LEB31, LEB3A)
problems.rootCause: Hybrid control module calibration drift combined with inverter thermal degradation causes the petrol engine to over-rev without effectively transferring torque to the driveline, creating a "rubber-band" drivability loss.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Official Honda diagnostic flash, inverter thermal paste replacement, hybrid control logic reset
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught before mechanical strain occurs; typically extends life by 15-20k miles

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt LEB3 PHEV Engine
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit of rebuilt Atkinson-cycle engine with upgraded hybrid control interfaces, bench testing, and 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Permanent resolution; addresses inverter wear, recalibrated for UK grey-import EV cycling

problems.recommendation: If the high-rev symptom appears only during cold starts or short EV bursts, a specialist diagnostic reset and inverter refresh may suffice. However, if the Clarity has logged persistent hybrid system fault codes or exhibits continuous power loss under acceleration, the internal inverter and planetary gears have likely suffered fatigue. In this scenario, a full rebuilt LEB3 unit with verified e-CVT sync is significantly more cost-effective than chasing intermittent electrical faults.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt LEB3 Honda Clarity engine prices for verified PHEV replacements

problems.group: Honda Clarity Charging System & Onboard Charger Fault
problems.h4: Honda Clarity Charging System & Onboard Charger Fault - Repair vs Replacement Cost
problems.affectedModels: Honda Clarity PHEV All Trims (2017-2021, LEB3, LEB3A)
problems.rootCause: Repeated fast-charging cycles and thermal stress degrade the onboard charger (OBC) relays and internal cooling circuitry, leading to communication sync failures between the charging port and the LEB3 engine management system.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Removal of faulty charging module, replacement of thermal-fused relays, charging port sync recalibration
repairOptions.longevity: Restores standard charging function; recommended before hybrid battery depletion accelerates

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Reconditioned PHEV Engine & Charging Interface
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Full supply & fit of rebuilt hybrid powertrain with upgraded charging interface components, voltage protocol verification, and warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Eliminates cascade failure risk; essential if OBC faults have already degraded the high-voltage battery interface

problems.recommendation: Charging port sync failures are often mistaken for battery degradation. A specialist voltage protocol test can quickly isolate whether the OBC module or the LEB3 hybrid interface is at fault. If the OBC has triggered repeated safety cut-offs, the hybrid control board likely sustained micro-damage. Replacing the entire rebuilt engine with integrated charging verification prevents future no-charge lockouts and restores full PHEV range.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Honda Clarity charging system compatible rebuilt engines

problems.h4: Honda Clarity e-CVT Transmission Shudder - Why Hybrid Drivelines Vibrate Under Load
problems.affectedModels: Honda Clarity PHEV Touring & FWD e-CVT (2017-2018-2021, LEB31, LEB3A)
problems.rootCause: Continuous transition between electric motor drive and petrol engine engagement causes planetary gear bearing fatigue and motor-generator alignment wear inside the e-CVT housing, producing driveline shudder at 30-50mph.

repairOptions.tier: Preventative - e-CVT Fluid Flush & Bearing Inspection
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Specialised hybrid transmission fluid replacement, magnetic debris analysis, motor-generator alignment check
repairOptions.longevity: Extends e-CVT lifespan by 10-15k miles; ineffective once metal shavings enter the planetary gear set

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Engine & e-CVT Compatible Motor Sync Unit
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete supply & fit of rebuilt LEB3 powertrain with verified e-CVT interface, motor-generator realignment, and load-testing warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Permanent fix; restores seamless hybrid transition and eliminates vibration across all driving modes

problems.recommendation: Do not ignore early-stage e-CVT shudder on the Honda Clarity. Once the planetary gears shed metal particles into the hybrid fluid, the entire e-CVT and LEB3 engine require simultaneous replacement. A minor fluid flush only buys time if caught at the first symptom. If vibration is consistent, a rebuilt engine with certified e-CVT alignment is the only reliable path forward.
problems.cta: Compare Honda Clarity e-CVT compatible rebuilt engine prices today

problems.group: Honda Clarity 12V Battery Drain & DC-DC Converter Interface Failure
problems.h4: Honda Clarity 12V Battery Drain & DC-DC Converter Interface Failure
problems.affectedModels: Honda Clarity PHEV All Variants (2017-2021, LEB3, LEB31, LEB3A)
problems.rootCause: The DC-DC converter voltage regulator fails to maintain stable 12V accessory output due to thermal cycling, causing parasitic drain that disables the high-voltage hybrid safety interlock and prevents the LEB3 engine from initiating.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replacement of auxiliary battery, DC-DC voltage regulator, hybrid safety interlock reset
repairOptions.longevity: Highly effective if caught before high-voltage relay corrosion occurs; typical lifespan 3-4 years

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Hybrid System & Rebuilt LEB3 Engine
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Full supply & fit of rebuilt PHEV engine with upgraded DC-DC interface, high-voltage relay verification, and 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Necessary if parasitic drain has triggered persistent safety lockouts or corroded main hybrid contactors

problems.recommendation: A dead 12V auxiliary battery on the Honda Clarity is rarely just a battery issue. The DC-DC converter is the true weak point, and repeated drain cycles quickly degrade the hybrid control module. If your Clarity shows intermittent "Power System" warnings or refuses to engage EV mode after a battery swap, request a specialist DC-DC voltage test. If the converter output is unstable, replacing the rebuilt engine with an upgraded interface is cheaper than repeatedly chasing electrical gremlins.
problems.cta: Get free Honda Clarity 12V interface & rebuilt engine replacement quotes

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Honda Clarity
finalCta.paragraph: Hybrid powertrain failures on the Honda Clarity are rarely sudden - they develop through predictable calibration drift, thermal stress, and interface fatigue. EngineMarket connects you directly with UK grey-import specialists who understand LEB3, LEB31, and LEB3A architecture inside out. Instead of paying main dealer premiums for diagnostic loops or incompatible second-hand units, compare verified rebuilt and reconditioned engine prices with nationwide delivery and hybrid interface verification. Every unit arrives bench-tested with upgraded components addressing the original failure mode, backed by a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty. Get back on the road without compromising on hybrid performance or budget.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Honda Clarity Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket’s UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Honda Clarity and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

items.description: The 1.5L Atkinson-cycle plug-in hybrid powertrain is the sole engine option fitted to the Honda Clarity across its 2017-2021 production run, combining a naturally aspirated petrol unit with dual electric motors and an e-CVT transmission for seamless hybrid operation. This LEB3-series engine was engineered specifically for PHEV applications, prioritising thermal efficiency and high-voltage system integration over conventional performance metrics, making it the defining powertrain for UK grey import Clarity owners seeking replacement options. items.question: How much does a Honda Clarity engine replacement cost?
items.answer: Honda Clarity engine replacement costs typically range from £995 for a used LEB3 unit to £2,800 for a fully rebuilt PHEV engine with upgraded hybrid interface components. Supply-only prices exclude fitting; supply & fit adds £450-£850 depending on specialist location. Grey import verification and e-CVT compatibility checks are included with all EngineMarket quotes.

Used Clarity PHEV engines available from £995 with mileage verification documentation
Supply and fit service adds £450-£850 depending on UK specialist garage location
All prices include e-CVT motor-generator alignment verification for grey import compliance

items.question: What engine codes fit my Honda Clarity PHEV?
items.answer: Only LEB3, LEB31, and LEB3A engine codes are compatible with Honda Clarity PHEV models sold as UK grey imports between 2017-2021. These 1.5L Atkinson-cycle hybrid engines integrate with the e-CVT transmission and high-voltage battery system. Enter your registration to verify your exact LEB3 sub-code before ordering any replacement unit.
keyPoints: LEB3 fits Base trim Clarity PHEV grey imports from 2017-2021 production years
LEB31 code applies to early Touring trim models with enhanced charging calibration
LEB3A engines suit facelift 2019-2021 Clarity with refined hybrid control mapping
All codes require e-CVT interface verification and high-voltage sync protocol testing
items.cta: Verify your Honda Clarity engine code with our free VIN compatibility checker

items.question: What are common Honda Clarity engine problems?
items.answer: Honda Clarity PHEV owners most frequently report HV-mode high-rev power loss, charging port sync failures, and 12V accessory battery drain affecting hybrid system enable. These issues typically appear between 40,000-75,000 miles on grey import vehicles. Rebuilt LEB3 engines from EngineMarket include upgraded components addressing these documented failure patterns with full warranty coverage.
keyPoints: HV-mode rubber-band drivability caused by inverter thermal degradation and calibration drift
Charging system communication faults trigger no-charge lockouts at 45,000-65,000 mile typical range
12V battery drain disables high-voltage safety interlock preventing engine start sequence
e-CVT motor-generator alignment wear causes driveline shudder under load at higher mileage
items.cta: Get quotes for Honda Clarity engines with upgraded hybrid failure mitigation components

items.question: Is a rebuilt Honda Clarity engine better than used?
items.answer: Rebuilt Honda Clarity engines offer superior value for grey import PHEV owners because they include upgraded hybrid interface components addressing known LEB3 failure points, plus a 12-month unlimited mileage warranty. Used engines are cheaper upfront but carry uncertain provenance and no guarantee of e-CVT compatibility or charging system integrity post-installation.
keyPoints: Rebuilt LEB3 units include upgraded inverter thermal management and charging sync verification
Used Clarity engines depend on donor vehicle history and may lack hybrid calibration documentation
Rebuilt engines undergo bench testing with fault code resolution guides for UK specialist fitting
Warranty coverage on rebuilt units protects against premature hybrid interface component failure

items.question: How do I find my Honda Clarity engine code?
items.answer: Your Honda Clarity engine code (LEB3, LEB31, or LEB3A) appears stamped on the engine block near the transmission bell housing, on the vehicle identification plate under the bonnet, or within your grey import documentation. Enter your registration number above for instant VIN-to-engine-code verification compatible with Clarity PHEV hybrid systems.

items.question: Does Honda Clarity engine replacement affect insurance?
items.answer: Honda Clarity engine replacement rarely affects insurance premiums when using like-for-like LEB3 codes with documented grey import compliance. Most UK insurers accept rebuilt or reconditioned engines if fitted by certified specialists with warranty documentation. Always notify your provider of the replacement and supply fitment certificates to maintain policy validity for your imported PHEV.

items.question: Is it worth replacing a Honda Clarity hybrid engine?
items.answer: Replacing a Honda Clarity hybrid engine is worthwhile when the vehicle has strong bodywork, low chassis mileage, and verified grey import history. Rebuilt LEB3 engines from £1,395 with 12-month warranty often cost less than dealer diagnostics for intermittent hybrid faults. Compare replacement cost against Clarity's residual value and your intended ownership period before deciding.
